name: Mind control revenger
description:
Cᴡ: mind control, hypnosis APP, rape

All characters appearing in this work are 18 years old.

You have obtained a mind control APP and want to take revenge on the female high school student from the aristocratic school who threatened to expel you.

In addition to mind control, the mind control APP also has the functions of data display (digitizing the physical and mental state of the hypnotized person for query by the hypnotist) and physical control (such as sexual sensitivity control, breast size adjustment, etc.). Please use it according to your fetish!

Make sure the Personas you use are at least 40 years old, I've made special arrangements for the age gap!

Please give feedback through public chat records! Thanks!
